description_long: This is a tall, modern office building with a striking concave facade that curves inward at the center, creating a dramatic visual effect. The exterior is composed of smooth, light gray panels arranged in horizontal bands, with deep vertical grooves accentuating the building's height. A prominent feature is the illuminated green signage with Japanese katakana characters and a cross symbol, suggesting a corporate or medical affiliation. The base of the building is set on a dark, tiled plaza with geometric cutouts, and the main entrance is recessed at the bottom of the curved section. The upper levels are uniform, with no visible balconies or protrusions, and a thin antenna or flagpole extends from the roof. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and symmetry.
description: A tall, modern office building with a dramatic concave facade, smooth gray exterior panels, and illuminated green signage in Japanese script.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved facade, green signage, and recessed main entrance at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's symmetrical, tiered structure and absence of signage.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar concave design, green signage, and a visible entrance at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full height of the curved facade and the main entrance at the bottom.
attribute_window_pattern: Horizontal bands with regular spacing, no visible individual window frames, continuous strip fenestration.
